race.name: Sun Valley Nordic Festival
race.tagline: Thirty kilometers beneath the Sawtooth peaks — Sun Valley's Nordic showcase on one of Idaho's finest trail systems.

vitals.location: Sun Valley Nordic Center, Ketchum, Idaho

climate.description: Mid-February in Sun Valley brings cold, dry conditions with excellent snowpack. Temperatures typically -15°C to 0°C. The high-desert mountain climate means intense sun and dry powder snow.
challenges: Intense high-altitude sun can affect wax and snow conditions
Dry air and altitude combine for quick dehydration
Occasional chinook winds can warm temperatures rapidly

course.primary: A 30km race on the Sun Valley Nordic Center trail system in Ketchum. World-class grooming on a system that regularly hosts national-level competitions. The course loops through the Wood River valley with stunning views of the Boulder and Pioneer mountain ranges.
course.grooming: Excellent — Sun Valley Nordic Center is known for top-tier grooming
features: Sun Valley Nordic Center is one of the premier trail systems in the western US
Stunning mountain scenery with Sawtooth and Boulder Mountain views
The Sun Valley area has deep skiing heritage dating to the 1930s
Multiple distance options make it accessible to all levels

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Sun Valley's Nordic pedigree and exceptional grooming stand out, as does the spectacular Idaho mountain scenery. Moderate field size and limited international draw keep it from higher tiers. One of the best-groomed courses in the western US.

history.summary: Sun Valley has been a skiing destination since 1936 when the Union Pacific Railroad built the Sun Valley Lodge as America's first destination ski resort. The Nordic center carries on that tradition, offering some of the finest groomed trails in the American West. The Nordic Festival celebrates the area's deep skiing culture.
notable_facts: Sun Valley was America's first destination ski resort (1936)
The Nordic Center maintains over 40km of groomed trails
Ernest Hemingway was a famous Sun Valley resident and skier
The area regularly hosts USSA and junior national Nordic competitions

youtube_data.search_query: Sun Valley Nordic Festival cross country ski race Sun Valley Nordic Center

videos.title: Nordic Skiing and New Nordic Center (HD 720p)
videos.description: Ned Wheeler, Director of Sun Valley Nordic Center encourages you to come on out and try cross country skiing on our 41Km of daily groomed Nordic trails. Come visit us in new state-of-the-art Nordic headquarters, the facility open to all Nordic skiers for the first time this winter. Looking forward to seeing out out here!

videos.title: Sun Valley becoming a Nordic skiing destination
videos.description: A strong sense of community, along with a seemingly endless trail system, has earned Sun Valley a new moniker: Nordic Town, USA.

videos.title: Nordic Skiing in Sun Valley, Idaho
videos.description: A glimpse in to the Nordic scene in Sun Valley, Idaho including the Nordic Festival and the Boulder Mountain Tour.

videos.title: Sun Valley Nordic Ski Festival 2012
videos.description: Pleasure skiing at the Sun Valley Nordic Ski Festival surrounding the Boulder Mountain Tour. The day following the race many TUNA skiers found their way to the Sun Valley Resort trails. Follow these skiers as they relax along the Trail Creek trails.

videos.title: 2012 Sun Valley Nordic Festival
videos.description: The 3rd annual Sun Valley Nordic Festival was held in Sun Valley, Idaho for 9 days from January 28 through February 5, 2012. The key events included "Ski The Rails", "Winter Sun Classic Race", Skin It To Win It" Downtown Jam and Nordic Sprints", "Sun Valley Demo Day", and was capped off with the "Boulder Mountain Tour." Nils Ribi Photography

videos.title: Sun Valley Nordic Festival 2011
videos.description: The second annual Sun Valley Nordic Festival was held in Sun Valley, Idaho for nine days from January 29 through February 6, 2011. A number of events were held which led up to the 36th running of the Boulder Mountain Tour held on February 5th.

quotes.text: It's amazing the trails are awesome. They call it Nordic town USA and it's no wonder - as far as just kilometers of trail facilities for Nordic skiers, different venues and then the community that we have here, I'm hard pressed to think of any other town in the country that can compete with Sun Valley for cross-country skiing.
